impact: The daemon currently has no needed tasks and two blocked retries that were superseded by the accepted sentinel-preserving validator. Moving those superseded retries out of selectable checkbox form and appending one fixture-first supervisor task gives the worker an eligible next cycle without reattempting stale failures.
summary: Park superseded blocked public-source-inventory retries and append a narrow supervisor repair task.
target_task: Supervisor repair: 2 task(s) are blocked: Task checkbox-70: Retry the public source inventory validator as a one-file implementation only after the `MODULE_PURPOSE` sentinel and expected unsafe-field fixture path pass validation.; Task checkbox-71: Retry the public source inventory validator as a no-dataclass one-file implementation only: preserve `MODULE_PURPOSE`, avoid `dataclasses`, keep to plain functions/constants/dicts, and validate the syntax-first import plus unsafe-field fixture before any broader behavior.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
